a:r.a:t: Win above NAPA - own the continuous naval assurance loop
NAPA is already a trusted stability engine. The defensible AVEVA opportunity is the decision, evidence and lifecycle-learning layer above every solver.
NAPA remains a solver of record for naval architecture, rule compliance and stability evidence.
NEW MOAT: CONTINUOUS NAVAL ASSURANCE CONTROL PLANE
A governed graph of every safety decision
One graph links change -> calculation -> decision -> evidence -> revision.
Add counterfactual design options, cross-domain impact and live operational learning - not another calculation silo.
NAPA = solver of record. AVEVA-based PLM = system of decision, evidence and lifecycle learning. Competitive moat: customer-owned APIs + assurance graph + closed-loop operational feedback.
